insurer_name: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited

inpatient_hospitalization.limit_text: Room rent charges capped at 1% of Annual Sum Insured for policies up to Rs. 4 Lakhs, no capping for Rs. 5 Lakhs and above

day_care_treatments.limit_text: Covered up to Annual Sum Insured
day_care_treatments.notes: Day Care treatment requires hospitalization as an inpatient for less than 24 hours in a Hospital.

domiciliary_treatment.limit_text: Covered for at least 3 consecutive days
domiciliary_treatment.notes: Excludes certain conditions like asthma, bronchitis, tonsillitis, etc.

ayush_coverage.limit_text: Covered up to Annual Sum Insured
ayush_coverage.notes: Treatment must be at a registered AYUSH Hospital or AYUSH Day Care Centre.

organ_donor_expenses.limit_text: Covered up to Annual Sum Insured
organ_donor_expenses.notes: Organ donation must conform to the Transplantation of Human Organs Act 1994.

ambulance_cover.limit_text: 1% of Annual Sum Insured maximum up to INR 10,000
ambulance_cover.notes: Road ambulance services only; air ambulance covered separately up to Annual Sum Insured.

restoration_benefit.limit_text: Reset up to 100% of Annual Sum Insured for policies less than Rs. 10 Lakhs (once) and unlimited for Rs. 10 Lakhs and above
restoration_benefit.notes: Not available for the first claim made during the Policy Year.

room_rent_capping: 1% of Annual Sum Insured for policies up to Rs. 4 Lakhs, no capping for Rs. 5 Lakhs and above
icu_capping: 2% of Annual Sum Insured for policies up to Rs. 4 Lakhs, no capping for Rs. 5 Lakhs and above
